backend/main.mo: Defines access-controlled user profiles and full data models for students, attendance, fees, tests, and exams with CRUD operations and blob storage support.
feature_evidence.json: Lists implemented features with linked files, components, and test references for verification.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Provides short summaries of major frontend files and their responsibilities.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind-based global styles defining OKLCH color variables for light and dark themes.
frontend/index.html: Base HTML entry file setting favicon, metadata, and mounting the React app.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Configures TanStack Router with public and authenticated management routes and root layout components.
frontend/src/components/admissions/Delet: Confirmation dialog for deleting a student with mutation handling and navigation.
frontend/src/components/AppErrorState.ts: Reusable error display component that maps errors to user-friendly messages.
Centered loading indicator component with optional message.
frontend/src/components/auth/LoginButton: Internet Identity login/logout button handling authentication flow and query cache clearing.
frontend/src/components/auth/ProfileSetu: Shows a dialog prompting authenticated users without a profile to enter their name and saves it via a mutation.
frontend/src/components/auth/RequireAuth: Wraps protected content and displays a login prompt or loading state when the user is not authenticated.
frontend/src/components/layout/Managemen: Provides the admin portal layout with header, sidebar navigation, and user profile display.
frontend/src/components/layout/PublicLay: Defines the public site layout with header, footer, and branding for non‑authenticated pages.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Creates and manages the backend actor tied to the current identity and refreshes dependent queries on change.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Implements Internet Identity context, handling login, logout, stored identity loading, and status tracking.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Contains React Query hooks for user profiles, students, and other backend operations using the actor.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind CSS setup defining theme variables and base styling for light and dark modes.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Bootstraps the React app with React Query and Internet Identity providers.
frontend/src/pages/admissions/Admissions: Displays a searchable list of students with navigation to add or view admission details.
frontend/src/pages/admissions/StudentDet: Shows full details of a selected student with options to edit or delete the record.
frontend/src/pages/admissions/StudentFor: Form for creating or editing a student profile, including photo upload and progress tracking.
frontend/src/pages/attendance/Attendance: Interface for viewing, marking, and saving student attendance for a selected date.
frontend/src/pages/exams/ExamsPage.tsx: UI page to add and list exam records for a selected student with filtering and form submission using query hooks.
frontend/src/pages/fees/FeesPage.tsx: UI page to record student fee payments and display fee history with totals using query hooks.
frontend/src/pages/PublicHome.tsx: Public landing page showing school info, features, and access to management if authenticated.
frontend/src/pages/tests/MonthlyTestsPag: UI page to add and view monthly test records for a selected student with month filtering and form handling.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility helpers for reading, storing, and clearing URL and session-based parameters, including hash-route parsing.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind configuration defining theme colors, animations, plugins, and content scanning paths.
project_state.json: Metadata file describing project state, features, requirements, and image needs for the school management site.
